title: LLM cost
subtitle: Measured model usage, attribution evidence, and the boundary of available cost data
boundaryTitle: Usage is measured; price attribution is not connected.
boundaryBody: This deployment reports provider calls and tokens without estimating spend, budgets, or invoice amounts.
byModelSubtitle: Measured provider tokens attributed to each configured model.
invocationLedgerSubtitle: Recent measured calls with correlation-scoped audit evidence.
tokenCompositionSubtitle: Input and output tokens across all measured invocations.
dailyTrendSubtitle: Total measured tokens per day; no price is inferred from volume.
dailyTrendAria: Open audit evidence for the daily token trend
trendUnavailable: At least two measured days are required for a token trend.
recordsTruncated: Showing the latest {shown} of {total} measured calls.
empty: No measured LLM usage recorded yet.
